civic_duty.question: Should national service (civil or military) be encouraged or required?

privacy.question: Should police be allowed to use facial recognition in public spaces?

speech.question: Should platforms remove lawful but harmful misinformation?

health.question: Should vaccination be mandatory for school attendance?

justice.question: Should juries be allowed to recommend restorative justice instead of prison?

ai_governance.question: Should AI systems always disclose that they are non-human?

urban_life.question: Should cities convert some street parking to bike/bus lanes?

education.question: Should K–12 curricula include comprehensive sex education?

housing.question: Should single-family zoning be relaxed to allow duplexes/triplexes?

environment.question: Should cities phase out gas leaf blowers and small engines?

work.question: Should employers be allowed to use keystroke/screen monitoring software?

culture.question: Should publicly funded art be allowed to offend religious or national symbols?
